title: Symbiote
description:
Along your travels, you stumble upon a dark, amorphous polyp. You can sense that it is very old, and very evil.

[sine]Approach...[/sine]

options.title: Approach
options.requires: None of your Attacks can be Enchanted.

notes: The Approach option is conditionally locked if there are no Attack cards in your deck that can be enchanted with Corrupted. Selecting Approach opens a card selection dialog to enchant an Attack card. Selecting Kill with Fire opens a dialog to transform cards into random cards.
